Posted 24 minutes ago

Shopify Developer to Rebuild Existing Store into Custom App-Based Theme

  • Just not interested
  • Vague Description
  • Unrealistic Expectations
  • Too many applicants
  • Job posted too long ago
  • Poor reviews about the client
  • Doesn't Match Skills
  • I am overqualified
  • Budget too low
  • Not in my preferred location
  • The client will not be notified. Your feedback helps us improve job search.
  • Verified
    Payment verified
  • Rating is 4.9 out of 5.
    4.9
    4.89 Stars, based on 10 feedbacks
  • $6K+ spent
  • Location DEU
  • Hourly: $5.00 - $20.00
  • Intermediate
  • Est. time: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week

I am looking for a Shopify developer who can rebuild my existing Shopify store into a new custom theme that matches my app design exactly. I already have a fully working Shopify Basic account with an existing store, products and checkout system. The current theme and design will not be used, the goal is to transform this existing store into a new theme based on my app UI. I will provide a PDF and screenshots that show exactly how the shop should look inside the app. The implementation needs to follow this design very closely without adding your own interpretation The final result will not be used as a standalone webshop. The shop will be displayed inside a mobile app as a full screen web integration. I will handle the integration myself, your task is to prepare the Shopify theme in a way that it works perfectly in this setup. The structure should not be built around fixed products. Currently there are three main products, a few secondary ones and additional accessories, but this will grow over time. The system must be flexible so I can manage and expand everything directly inside Shopify without needing further development later. You will rebuild the following parts based on the provided design a home screen that mirrors the app start view sections for featured products and new releases a product overview with categories or collections a product detail page the general navigation structure as shown in the app In addition to the visual part, there are a few technical requirements you prepare endpoints that allow us to fetch product data for sections like new releases and featured products. The response should be in JSON format and include product name, thumbnail URL, price and product URL the existing checkout system must remain and be reused. It already supports Turkish payment providers and should not be changed in its logic, only visually adapted to match the new theme after a purchase, a request must be sent to our backend containing the user email and the product identifier so we can process digital entitlements on our side the shop will run inside the app in a dedicated full screen view, so the implementation must be clean, fast and optimized for this usage the existing login system in the current Shopify setup should continue to be used all icons and visual elements should be manageable inside Shopify so I can change them later without touching code This is not about creating a new shop from scratch. It is about taking an already working Shopify store and rebuilding the frontend into a new, clean and scalable theme that matches the app exactly. Please share examples of similar Shopify work.

  • Proposals: 10 to 15

Website Developer Needed for Ergonomic Furniture Store

  • Vague Description

  • Doesn't Match Skills

  • Verified
    Payment verified
  • Rating is 5.0 out of 5.
    5.0
    5.00 Stars, based on 2 feedbacks
  • $100+ spent
  • Location GBR
  • Fixed price
  • Intermediate
  • Est. budget: $300.00

🧠 Project Overview I’m building a premium ergonomic eCommerce brand in the UK and need a high-converting Shopify store inspired by: 👉 https://desktronic.co.uk/ Important: The design should follow a similar structure, layout, and user experience, but must be fully original. Product Range • Standing desks • Ergonomic chairs • Sleep products (pillows, etc.) Products will be sourced from: 👉 https://www.ergonomist.co.uk/ (Focus only on desks, chairs, and sleep categories) ⸻ 🎯 Scope of Work 1. Full Shopify Store Build • Clean, modern, premium design • Mobile-first and fast loading • Built for high-ticket conversions (£300–£1000+) ⸻ 2. Homepage (Conversion-Focused) Structure should be similar to Desktronic, including: • Strong hero section with clear value proposition and CTA • Trust signals (delivery, warranty, returns) • Best sellers • Problem → solution section (back pain, productivity, posture) • Bundles section (very important) • Reviews and testimonials • B2B / office solutions section • Footer with strong CTA and visible phone number ⸻ 3. Product Pages (Highest Priority) Product pages must be built for conversion and feel similar in quality to Desktronic. Required features: • Clean product gallery • Variant selectors (size, colour, material) • Sticky add-to-cart • Benefit-driven layout (not just technical specs) • Product bundles (e.g. desk + chair + accessories) • Upsells and cross-sells • Accordion sections (delivery, warranty, specifications) • Urgency elements (stock messaging, delivery timelines) This is the most critical part of the project. Only apply if you have strong experience building high-performing product pages. ⸻ 4. Collection Pages • Standing desks • Ergonomic chairs • Sleep collection Clean, premium layout aligned with the overall brand. ⸻ 5. Key Features • Bundling system (essential) • Upsells and cross-sells • Reviews integration • Live chat • Sticky header with phone number • Lead capture form (e.g. “Get workspace advice”) ⸻ 🎨 Design Direction The brand should feel premium, minimal, and modern, similar to: • https://desktronic.co.uk/ • Humanscale Key direction: • Strong typography • Clean layout with plenty of white space • High-end visual feel ⸻ 🤖 Visual & AI Support (Preferred) Ideally, you can also: • Create realistic product and lifestyle images using AI • Enhance or improve supplier images • Produce clean, consistent visuals across the site ⸻ 🛠️ Requirements • Proven Shopify experience • Strong understanding of conversion rate optimisation (CRO) • Experience building high-ticket eCommerce stores • Bonus: experience in furniture or ergonomic products ⸻ 📦 Deliverables • Fully built Shopify store • All pages completed (home, product, collections) • Optimised for mobile and desktop • Ready to launch with products uploaded ⸻ 💬 To Apply Please include: • Examples of similar Shopify stores you’ve built • Details of your experience with conversion-focused design • Experience with bundles and upsells • Experience with AI-generated visuals (if applicable) • Estimated timeline and cost ⸻ 🚀 Goal Build a premium ergonomic Shopify store that matches the quality and performance of Desktronic, with a strong focus on converting traffic from paid ads into high-value customers. I’m looking for someone who understands design, conversion, and branding, not just basic development.

  • Proposals: 5 to 10

We are looking for an experienced Shopify developer to build a high-converting online store that generates $1 million in revenue. The ideal candidate should have a strong understanding of Shopify's platform and be able to design and develop a visually appealing and user-friendly storefront. The main responsibilities will include customizing themes, integrating plugins, setting up payment gateways, and optimizing the store for SEO. Skills required: - Proficiency in Shopify development - Strong knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript - Experience with liquid templating language - Familiarity with responsive design principles - Ability to optimize website performance - Excellent problem-solving and communication skills This is a medium-sized project with a duration of 1 to 3 months. We are looking for an expert Shopify developer who can deliver exceptional results within the given timeframe. If you have a proven track record of building successful Shopify stores and can drive revenue growth, we would love to hear from you.

I have already integrated a working virtual try-on feature called Mirra into a Shopify store. The product-page flow works end-to-end. Now I need a Shopify designer/developer to elevate the overall storefront and product-page presentation so it feels premium, polished, and productized. This is not backend/API work. This is a Shopify theme/UI/UX polish project. What I need: • Refine the overall Shopify storefront so it feels premium, modern, and high-end • Improve the product page layout, spacing, hierarchy, typography, and button presentation • Make the “Try with Mirra” experience feel like a core premium feature, not just a widget added to Dawn • Improve the visual balance of the modal and result presentation if needed • Create a stronger mobile experience • Keep the store clean, fast, and stable • Maintain Mirra branding direction, including pastel yellow accents Reference direction: • bitstudio.ai for polish, confidence, and premium product feel • Mirra should not copy bitStudio branding, but should reach a similar standard of finish Important: • The Mirra integration is already working • This role is focused on theme polish, storefront presentation, and premium Shopify UX • I want someone with a strong eye for visual design, not just basic theme editing Please include: • examples of Shopify stores you have visually polished • product pages or landing pages you’ve made feel premium • your approach to improving a default Shopify theme into a stronger branded experience

    5.00 Stars, based on 4 feedbacks
  • $300+ spent
  • Location NLD
  • Hourly: $4.00 - $5.00
  • Expert
  • Est. time: More than 6 months, 30+ hrs/week

We are looking for a Product Listing Specialist to join our e-commerce business and work closely with our team. This role is focused purely on creating, uploading, and optimizing product listings. The position starts with flexible hours and can grow into a full-time role as we scale. You should be fast, detail-oriented, and highly organized. Clear communication and consistency are key in this role. We work in a fast-moving environment where AI tools play a big role, so being comfortable with new tools and adapting quickly to changes is essential. A few questions we would like you to answer: Do you have experience with product listing (preferably in e-commerce)? If yes, please explain what you typically handle (descriptions, variants, images, etc.). Do you have experience with Shopify? If yes, please explain what you have done within the platform. To keep things structured and easy to review, please start your application with the words I am the one. Do you have experience using AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Canva, or image generation tools)? If yes, please explain which tools you use and how. How do you make sure your work is accurate and free of mistakes? Please explain your approach. How do you handle repetitive tasks while maintaining speed and quality? How many hours per week are you available currently? Are you open to scaling to a full-time role in the future? What is your desired monthly compensation? What were your previous roles? Are you currently working for another company? What is your WiFi speed and electricity reliability? Please keep in mind that this role is a strong opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling e-commerce environment and develop both personally and financially. We’ve been building and scaling for over a year and a half now, and we’re looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term and take ownership of their role. We are serious about this job offer, and we care about you, your family, and your financial stability. We are looking for someone reliable, consistent, and motivated.

Title: Shopify Operations & Google Shopping Assistant (2 Stores – Ongoing Role) Description: I am looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Shopify Operations Assistant to help manage and run two active eCommerce stores. My current assistant is temporarily unavailable, so I need someone who can step in immediately and take ownership of the day-to-day operations. This is not a “task-only” role — I need someone who can think, prioritise, and ensure things get done properly. About the Business: Two Shopify stores (home furniture & commercial furniture) Dropshipping model with multiple suppliers Based in Australia Key Responsibilities: Order processing (Shopify → suppliers → Xero) Customer service (email enquiries, order updates) Coordinating shipping and bookings Managing supplier communication Maintaining product listings (uploads, edits, optimisation) Monitoring stock and resolving order issues Managing and updating Google Shopping feeds (titles, pricing, product data) Working with Google Merchant Center (fixing disapprovals, feed optimisation) Assisting with Google Shopping campaigns (product-level focus, performance tracking) Keeping clear daily task lists and reporting progress What I Need: Strong Shopify experience (must have) Experience with Google Shopping / Merchant Center (important) Highly organised and proactive Good written English and communication Able to follow systems but also think independently Reliable and consistent (this is critical) Nice to Have: Experience with Xero Experience with Google Sheets Experience with apps like Simprosys or similar feed tools Understanding of product-level ad performance (ROAS, CPC) Hours: Part-time to start (approx. 4–5 hours per day) Ideally aligned with Sydney time (11am–3pm preferred) Important: Karen (my current assistant) is currently away, so I need someone who can step in quickly and take responsibility without needing constant supervision. If you are someone who takes ownership and gets things done properly, this will become an ongoing role. To Apply: Please include: Your Shopify experience (specific tasks you’ve handled) Your Google Shopping / Merchant Center experience Examples of stores or accounts you’ve worked on Your availability (hours & timezone) Why you are a good fit for this role

  • Verified

  • Rating is 5.0 out of 5.
    5.0
    4.97 Stars, based on 16 feedbacks
  • $100K+ spent
  • Location Germany
  • Hourly
  • Expert
  • Est. time: More than 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

Greenblut ist eine Shopify-Agentur, die KI als Kernwerkzeug nutzt. Wir wurden zur Zertifizierung im Anthropic Claude Partner Network ausgewählt und suchen einen Designer, der/die mit KI kuratiert statt pixelgenau umsetzt. Bei uns beschreibst du, was du willst — und Claude Code baut drei Varianten in Sekunden. Du wählst, iterierst, verfeinerst. Du bist nicht der Umsetzer, sondern der Kreativ-Direktor, der das Ergebnis steuert. Du bringst mindestens drei Jahre Erfahrung mit einem starken visuellen Auge und einem guten Gespür für E-Commerce UX mit. Du kannst Design-Entscheidungen präzise in Worte fassen und hast bereits mit KI-Design-Tools wie Midjourney, DALL-E oder idealerweise Claude Code gearbeitet. Ein grundlegendes Verständnis von HTML und CSS sowie Erfahrung mit Shopify Themes wie Dawn, Horizon oder Custom-Themes gehören zu deinem Handwerkszeug. Du sprichst Deutsch auf Muttersprachniveau. Bei uns wirst du einer der ersten Claude Certified Architects — die Zertifizierung übernehmen wir. Du übernimmst eine Kreativ-Direktor-Rolle, in der du kuratierst, was KI baut, und arbeitest mit dem Shopify AI Toolkit direkt in deinem täglichen Workflow. Die Stelle ist remote, die Zeiten sind flexibel, wir starten mit 10 bis 20 Stunden pro Woche. Ein Plus sind Liquid-Kenntnisse, Erfahrung mit Figma und ein Verständnis für CRO und Conversion-Optimierung.

  • Proposals: Less than 5

  • Est. budget: $200.00

We are launching a new Shopify store focused on highly personalised products. We are looking for a developer to build and implement a complete custom product experience that allows customers to easily personalise products with their own text and images. This is not a basic product page — the goal is to create a clean, premium, high-converting experience with advanced customisation and AI-assisted features. Build a seamless product personalisation system that: Is extremely easy to use (especially on mobile) Feels clean and premium Allows flexible customisation (not restrictive) Uses AI to enhance the experience Maximises conversion rate 1. Product Personalisation System Customers must be able to: Upload their own photo Enter a name Enter a custom message (with character limits) Choose from preset sayings OR fully write their own text 2. AI-Assisted Features (DIFFERENTIATOR) We want to go beyond standard builds by adding: AI-generated text suggestions (e.g. message ideas) Optional auto-formatting of text to fit design Smart suggestions based on product type This must remain simple and not overwhelm the user. 3. Guided UX Flow (IMPORTANT) The experience should feel like a step-by-step builder, not a normal product page: Upload Photo Add Name Write or Select Message Preview Add to Cart Must be: Smooth Fast Mobile-first 4. Live / Dynamic Preview Customer should clearly see what they are creating Real-time or near real-time preview preferred 5. Homepage Setup Clean, high-converting homepage Clear messaging and flow into product builder Premium look and feel Mobile optimised 6. Order & Data Handling All custom inputs must attach correctly to orders Image uploads stored properly Clean backend for fulfilment 7. Print-On-Demand Integration Recommend and implement best solution Orders must include: Image Custom text Automatically sent for production and shipping 🧠 WHAT WE NEED FROM YOU Strong Shopify experience (themes, apps, custom builds) Experience with product personalisation tools Ability to recommend the best stack (apps vs custom) Understanding of UX and conversion Ability to keep things simple and fast 🚫 WHAT WE DON’T WANT Overcomplicated builds App overload that slows the store Generic templates Cluttered UI 📦 DELIVERABLES Fully functional personalised product builder Clean, premium homepage Mobile-optimised experience Working image upload + custom input system AI-assisted features implemented POD integration set up and tested

What we're building RLT Lab is an Australian red light therapy brand selling direct-to-consumer. We have had two bespoke webpage designs created for us as HTML/CSS files, a homepage and a product page, and we need an experienced Shopify developer to convert these into a fully functional Shopify store built on the Dawn theme. The designs are production-ready. Your job is not to design, it's to build. We need the HTML/CSS converted faithfully into Shopify Liquid, with the store set up so that we can manage products, update content, and add new SKUs without touching code. What we're handing you • Two complete HTML/CSS/JS files, homepage and product page, both fully functional and ready to reference • A clear design system with defined colour palette, typography (Syne, Instrument Serif, Geist Mono), spacing, and component patterns • All copy, section content, and placeholder product data • Clear written brief (this document) and availability for a kick-off call Skills and stack You must have demonstrable experience with all of the following: • Shopify Liquid templating, sections, snippets, blocks, schema • Converting custom HTML/CSS to Shopify themes (not page builders, native Liquid) • Dawn theme architecture (preferred) or equivalent headless-compatible base theme • Vanilla JavaScript, the interactive elements in our design are written in plain JS with no framework dependencies • CSS custom properties, our design system is built entirely on CSS variables • Shopify metafields and product data modelling • Shopify Theme Customiser / settings_schema.json configuration • Responsive design implementation (mobile-first) • Basic Lighthouse performance optimisation Nice to have (not required) • Experience with the Shopify Storefront API or Online Store 2.0 features • Familiarity with Shopify Markets (Australian store, may expand) • Prior experience in health, wellness, or DTC e-commerce 04

Job Post We’re looking for a Shopify designer/developer to refine and upgrade our product page. This is a design + implementation role. We already have a clear direction — we’re not looking for someone to reinvent everything. We need someone who can execute cleanly, improve flow, and elevate the page. Project Scope • Transition our current product page from Liquid-based layout to a template-based structure • Keep the core layout and brand feel, but improve flow, spacing, and clarity • Add and style new sections, features, and selected apps (we will specify) • Improve visual hierarchy, colour balance, and overall cohesion • Ensure a strong mobile experience • Maintain fast load speed and clean implementation What We’re Looking For • Someone who can both design and implement — not just one or the other • Ability to take direction and execute precisely • Strong understanding of ecommerce UX and conversion-focused layouts • Confidence to give clear, honest feedback if something won’t work • Clean, modern design approach (not cluttered or overdesigned) Important • This is not a full redesign from scratch • We already know what we want — your role is to execute and refine • Do not overcomplicate the build or add unnecessary features • Focus on making the page cleaner, stronger, and higher converting Optional (Paid Scope Extension) We may ask for a structured audit of the current product page before or during the project. this at your own will, it is not a requirement. Skills Required • Shopify theme development (Liquid, templates, sections) • Shopify 2.0 templates and customisation • Front-end development (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) • Ecommerce UX / CRO (conversion rate optimisation) • Experience integrating and styling Shopify apps • Mobile optimisation and responsive design • Strong attention to detail To Apply Please include: • Examples of product pages you’ve designed and built • Any experience improving conversion or UX on Shopify stores • Brief outline of how you approach refining an existing product page

  • Expert
  • Est. time: Less than 1 month, Less than 30 hrs/week

Overview We are seeking a results-driven Shopify expert to transform and scale our eCommerce store into a highly profitable, conversion-optimized revenue engine—while also preparing the business for the next wave of AI-driven commerce and discovery. This role goes beyond traditional Shopify management. You will own: Growth strategy Conversion optimization Profitability AI compatibility and structured data readiness Primary Objective Turn our Shopify store into a: Profitable and scalable sales channel AI-readable, AI-recommendable product ecosystem Key Responsibilities 1. Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Audit full funnel (landing page → checkout) Optimize PDPs (product detail pages) for clarity, trust, and speed Run A/B tests on: Headlines Pricing Offers Layouts Reduce friction and cart abandonment 2. Revenue & Profit Growth Build bundles, upsells, subscriptions Optimize pricing for margin expansion Identify profit leaks (shipping, discounting, CAC inefficiencies) Focus on contribution margin, not just revenue 3. Shopify Store Optimization Customize theme (Dawn or similar) Improve site speed and mobile UX Ensure tracking (Meta Pixel, GA4) is accurate Optimize app stack (lean + high performance) 4. Analytics & Data Ownership Own key KPIs: CVR AOV CAC LTV ROAS / MER Build dashboards Identify funnel bottlenecks and fix them fast 5. Marketing & Funnel Alignment Align ad creative with on-site messaging Build high-converting landing pages Improve email/SMS flows (Klaviyo) Increase retention and repeat purchases 🚀 6. AI Compatibility & Structured Data Optimization (NEW – CRITICAL) You will organize and structure all store assets so they are easily understood, indexed, and recommended by AI systems such as: ChatGPT Gemini Core Responsibilities Structure product data for AI readability: Clear product descriptions (benefits → use cases → outcomes) Standardized specs, ingredients, and attributes Implement and optimize: Schema markup (JSON-LD) Rich product metadata FAQ structured data Ensure compatibility with: Google Shopping / Merchant Center AI search and recommendation engines AI-Ready Content Structuring Rewrite product pages to be: Question-answer friendly (for AI retrieval) Clear, factual, and non-ambiguous Create: FAQ sections designed for AI extraction “Best for” / “Use case” structured sections Normalize naming conventions across: Products Variants Collections Data Layer & Feed Optimization Optimize product feeds for: Google Meta Future AI marketplaces Ensure consistent: Titles Descriptions Tags Attributes AI Discovery Strategy Position products to appear in: “Best products for X” queries AI-generated recommendations Build content that answers: “What should I buy for ___?” “Best solution for ___?” Future-Proofing Prepare store for: AI shopping agents Conversational commerce Voice search Maintain structured, clean datasets that AI can easily interpret 7. Customer Experience & Retention Optimize post-purchase flows Improve repeat purchase rate Build loyalty and referral systems Reduce refunds through better expectation setting Required Experience Proven success scaling Shopify stores to profitability Strong CRO and data-driven mindset Experience with: Shopify backend GA4 / analytics Meta Pixel / CAPI Experience structuring product/catalog data Preferred Experience Experience preparing stores for AI search / semantic search Familiarity with: Schema markup Product feeds SEO + AI convergence Direct response marketing background KPIs for Success Increase CVR within 60–90 days Increase AOV via bundling and upsells Achieve or improve positive contribution margin Improve AI visibility (indexed product richness, structured data coverage) Increase organic + AI-driven discovery traffic Compensation Structure (Recommended) Base + performance bonus tied to: Revenue growth Profitability milestones Conversion improvements AI-readiness implementation Who This Is NOT For Designers without performance experience Developers who don’t understand revenue Anyone not fluent in data + execution Anyone unfamiliar with AI-driven commerce trends Ideal Candidate Thinks like an operator, not a freelancer Obsessed with profit, not vanity metrics Understands where eCommerce is going (AI-first) Executes fast and tests constantly

    Payment verified
  • Rating is 5.0 out of 5.
    5.0
    4.97 Stars, based on 16 feedbacks
  • $100K+ spent
  • Location Germany
  • Hourly
  • Expert
  • Est. time: More than 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

Greenblut sucht einen Entwickler, der Claude Code nicht nur kennt, sondern täglich nutzt. Wir wurden zur Zertifizierung im Anthropic Claude Partner Network ausgewählt und bauen unser Entwickler-Team aus. Bei uns bist du der Senior, der reviewt, was Claude Code baut. Du triffst Architektur-Entscheidungen, definierst Code-Standards und bist das Qualitäts-Gate für alles, was in Produktion geht. Du bist nicht der, der jede Zeile selbst schreibt — du bist der, der sicherstellt, dass das, was Claude Code baut, wartbar, sicher und performant ist. Du bringst mindestens drei Jahre Full-Stack-Erfahrung mit JavaScript und TypeScript, Node.js sowie React oder Next.js mit. Du nutzt Claude Code, Cursor oder Copilot bereits produktiv in deinem täglichen Workflow. Das Terminal ist dein Zuhause — git, npm, CLI-Tools und SSH gehören zu deinem Alltag. Du hast solide Shopify-Erfahrung mit Liquid, Theme-Entwicklung, der Admin API via GraphQL und der Shopify CLI, und du kannst Code reviewen und Architektur-Entscheidungen begründen. Deutsch sprichst du fließend. Bei uns wirst du Claude Certified Architect — die Zertifizierung übernehmen wir. Du arbeitest mit dem Shopify AI Toolkit inklusive GraphQL-Validierung, Liquid Theme-Check und MCP Server, und du übernimmst eine Architekt-Rolle, in der du die Standards definierst, an die sich Claude Code hält. Die Stelle ist remote, die Zeiten sind flexibel, wir starten mit 15 bis 30 Stunden pro Woche. Was wir konkret bauen: ein WooCommerce-zu-Shopify Migrationstool als Node.js CLI, KI-Shopping-Agenten mit dem Shopify Storefront MCP, sowie automatisierte QA- und Code-Review-Pipelines. Ein Plus sind Erfahrung mit der Anthropic API oder MCP, Python-Kenntnisse, Shopify-Plus-Erfahrung sowie eigene Claude Code Skills, die du bereits gebaut hast.

  • Est. time: More than 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week

Title: Shopify Dropship Order Fulfillment Virtual Assistant Description: We are a fast-growing powersports/motorcycle accessories e-commerce store looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to handle our dropship order fulfillment process daily. What you'll be doing: Logging into our Shopify store each day to identify which orders need to be dropshipped Logging into multiple wholesale distributor portals to place those orders Entering customer name, address, and product details accurately into each portal Recording the distributor order number and tracking information back into Shopify Sending customers a confirmation email using our provided template Flagging any issues (out of stock, portal errors, address problems) promptly Creating new product listings This is NOT: A marketing role A customer service role A store setup role This IS: Repetitive, detail-oriented daily order processing Data entry across multiple platforms A long-term, ongoing position with consistent hours Requirements: Proven experience with Shopify order management Strong attention to detail — errors affect real customer shipments Reliable internet connection and consistent daily availability Ability to follow written SOPs and video training Good written English for flagging issues Experience logging into and navigating wholesale/distributor portals is a plus Must be available during U.S. business hours (9:00 am-5:00 pm PT). Hours: Approximately 2-3 hours per day, 5 days per week To apply, please answer the following: Describe your experience with Shopify order fulfillment specifically Have you ever placed orders through wholesale or distributor portals? If so, which ones? What is your hourly rate? What hours are you available and in what time zone? Write the word BIKER at the top of your application so we know you read the full post.
